name: bayeslab-ion
description: Industry-specific equity research through the Bayeslab ION remote MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Published ION research and isolated company analysis
interface.longDescription: Use Bayeslab ION inside Codex to find published industry-specific equity research, inspect evidence and valuation, compare quarterly history, and queue isolated paid company analyses without changing the reviewed report library.
defaultPrompt: Find the latest published ION research for a company and separate evidence, valuation, and unresolved risks.
Compare a company's ION verdict and valuation across available screening periods.
Show the relevant ION industry methodology before proposing a new analysis job.
